title: AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEMS OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY-THREE HUNDRED ONE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4428 / 57 OG No. 13, 2295 (March 27, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2905, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEMS OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY-THREE HUNDRED ONE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (

q

), page 377 of Republic Act Numbered Twenty-three hundred one, is amended to read as follows:

" (

q

) Lipata Elementary School shop building, Minglanillaâ

Construction .................P5,000.00."

SEC. 2. Item 15(a), page 528 of the same Act, is amended to read as follows:

"15. Carcar:

(a) Valencia public market............P15,000.00."

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
